'''''Bastion''''' was an [[Imperial II-class Star Destroyer/Legends|''Imperial II-class'' Star Destroyer]], commanded by [[Captain/Legends|Captain]] [[Brannij]], which served under [[Moff/Legends|Moff]] [[Kentor Sarne]] in the [[Battle of Kathol System]].

During the battle, ''Bastion'' and its sister-[[Starship/Legends|ship]] [[Raptor (Star Destroyer)|''Raptor'']] were called in to protect [[Kathol sector/Legends|Kathol]] from [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] forces, which were led by the [[Bothan/Legends|Bothan]] [[Kursk Mal'ia]] and the [[Bothan Combat Response Element]]. The combined firepower of the two [[Star Destroyer/Legends|Star Destroyers]] began to turn the battle in the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Empire's]] favor, but the death of [[DarkStryder]] and the defeat of Moff Sarne left the Imperial [[Fleet/Legends|fleet]] without leadership. The ''Bastion'' took heavy damage, until Captain Brannij realized that Sarne was only worried about saving himself. Brannij then ordered the ''Bastion''{{'s}} guns to fire on the [[launch gate]] which [[Orbit/Legends|orbited]] Kathol, destroying the gate and robbing Sarne of any hope of re-establishing the gates. Once Sarne was defeated, Brannij took the ''Bastion'' and the remaining Imperial ships and fled into [[Hyperspace/Legends|hyperspace]].
